name: Lillian
bio:
Forest Vampire, former shrine maiden accidentally turned into a Flower Sprite. She found belonging in the Vampire Castle and uses magic to protect it.

Role: Buff Support
Intro: A Support hero that increases allies' ATK and restores HP to all allies.

skillSlots.name: Heretical Prayer
skillSlots.description: Uses [Magic Melody] to restore HP equal to 150% ATK for highest-ATK ally and increases target's ATK by 20% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Blessing of Forest
skillSlots.description: Restores HP equal to 74% ATK for all allies. If target's HP is below 50%, Healing Effect increases by 20%.
